## Task Type

Select one:

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Experiment
- [ ] Manuscript
- [ ] Literature
- [ ] Research design
- [ ] Documentation

## Research Purpose

Explain how this task supports the central claim that effective ML scaffolding should improve learner independence rather than simply increase assistance.

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Change is committed in Git
- [ ] Tests are added or updated if code changes
- [ ] Documentation is updated if workflow or interpretation changes
- [ ] Synthetic results are not overclaimed as human-learning evidence
- [ ] Metrics remain interpretable and auditable

## Notes

Add relevant implementation or manuscript notes here.
